author: ifq-design-skills
description: IFQ Design Skills · built-in HTML templates with ambient IFQ cues already woven into layout rhythm, metadata, and colophon logic. Agents should Read the template before generating, then fork-and-fill with subject matter instead of blank-starting.

qualityContract.thesis: Make AI higher leverage by turning loose visual requests into routed, template-first, verified HTML artifacts.
qualityContract.agentFailurePolicy: If a required fact, asset, permission, or export dependency is missing, continue with labeled assumptions only when reversible; otherwise stop at the smallest useful HTML source and report the blocker.
qualityContract.clawhubScope: ClawHub bundle outputs local HTML/SVG/static source and export plans; MP4/GIF/PDF/PPTX automation lives in the full GitHub repo.

M-01.label: Launch Film
M-01.outputBoundary: HTML motion source and posters in ClawHub; MP4/GIF only in full repo.

M-02.label: Portfolio
M-02.outputBoundary: Single-page HTML and optional OG/static companion.

M-03.label: Whitepaper
M-03.outputBoundary: A4/long-form HTML in ClawHub; PDF only in full repo.

M-04.label: Dashboard
M-04.outputBoundary: Dense dashboard HTML with real or labeled placeholder data.

M-05.label: Compare
M-05.outputBoundary: Cited comparison HTML/social source; no hidden AI scoring.

M-06.label: Onboarding
M-06.outputBoundary: Clickable HTML prototype with primary path checked.

M-07.label: Changelog
M-07.outputBoundary: Timeline HTML and optional social static source.

M-08.label: Keynote
M-08.outputBoundary: HTML deck in ClawHub; PDF/PPTX only in full repo.

M-09.label: Social Kit
M-09.outputBoundary: Multi-size HTML/static source with platform dimensions.

M-10.label: Card / Invite
M-10.outputBoundary: Print-sized SVG/HTML source; PDF only in full repo.

M-11.label: Brand Diagnosis
M-11.outputBoundary: Diagnosis report and direction boards; do not invent missing brand evidence.

M-12.label: Full Brand System
M-12.outputBoundary: ClawHub source assets and application examples; archive creation only when the runtime supports it.

templates.name: Editorial Hero Landing
templates.notes: IFQ-native hero scaffold with rust ledger, sparkle cue, quiet colophon, and editorial header rhythm.

templates.name: Keynote Title Slide
templates.notes: IFQ keynote title slide with field-note stamp area, spark cluster, and rust divider.

templates.name: Command Center Dashboard
templates.notes: Left nav + KPI strip + 3×3 metric grid + quiet IFQ live-system footer. Uses hand-drawn radar/arrow icons.

templates.name: Vertical Infographic (小红书长图)
templates.notes: Multi-section scroll with timeline, pull-quotes, and IFQ field-note footer treatment.

templates.name: X/Twitter Share Card
templates.notes: IFQ social card with rust ledger, spark cue, and authored bottom line.

templates.name: A vs B Comparison Matrix
templates.notes: IFQ comparison sheet with radar footer and field-research metadata.

templates.name: Changelog Timeline
templates.notes: Release ledger with mono dates, rust timeline spine, and IFQ-authored footer.

templates.name: Business Card (90×54mm + 3mm bleed)
templates.notes: IFQ business card scaffold with spark cue, quiet URL, and authored back colophon.

templates.name: Essay-Style Portfolio
templates.notes: Narrow-column essay layout with 5 switchable variants (Editorial Serif, Terminal Hacker, Magazine Grid, Paper Journal, Minimalist Card). Currently/Writing/Building structure, content-first.

templates.name: Onboarding Flow Prototype
templates.notes: 5-screen horizontal flow with CSS scroll-snap, iPhone device frames, progress indicator, user mindset annotations, and data-track attributes for analytics.

templates.name: Brand Diagnosis Report
templates.notes: 6-dimension SVG radar chart, score cards, three direction moodboard cards, and Keep/Fix/Quick Wins tri-section. Pure CSS/SVG, no library.

templates.name: Multi-Platform Social Kit
templates.notes: Gallery showing X (1200×675), RedNote (1242×1656), IG Square (1080×1080), and WeChat (900×383) formats side-by-side with shared brand tokens.
